grant_and_term.renewal_conditions: 90-180 day notice; sign then-current FA (may have materially different terms); equipment to current standards; minimum sales (greater of national median or $6.00 × population) for each of prior 2 years; minimum royalty compliance; $5,000 fee; execute within 90 days of presentation
grant_and_term.burden_level: High — short term, renewal at franchisor's then-current terms

fees_and_payment.royalty: 4% of Gross Sales (broadly defined to include subcontractor revenue)
fees_and_payment.technology_fees: Extensive — RMS $525/mo, Xactimate, MS 365, QB, call center, etc.
fees_and_payment.cross_default: Default on promissory note = default on FA

site_selection.requirements: Must maintain commercial office in territory. No buildout. No site approval by PDRI.

training_obligations.initial: 330 hours mandatory (224 classroom + 106 OJT). Must complete to PDRI satisfaction.
training_obligations.ongoing: May be required to attend additional training upon reaching $1M cumulative GS or at Launch/RBC request
training_obligations.recertification: PDRI reserves right to implement 3-5 day recertification every 3 years
training_obligations.estimate_review: PDRI reviews all estimates during initial 8-week operating period
training_obligations.burden_level: Medium-High — extensive initial training, ongoing requirements

operational_obligations.operations_manual: Must comply. Changes require Council vote but PDRI can modify standards/specs unilaterally.
operational_obligations.software: Must use designated Common Software (RMS), Xactimate/Symbility, QuickBooks, Qvinci, MS 365, Matterport, etc.
operational_obligations.reporting: Required financial reporting via Qvinci; franchise-specific compilation by CPA
operational_obligations.ai_restrictions: Trade secrets cannot be entered into public/open AI models
operational_obligations.burden_level: High — extensive technology, reporting, and compliance obligations

termination_triggers.franchisee_termination: Not applicable (except NY addendum grants termination on any legal grounds)
termination_triggers.burden_level: High — broad non-curable default list, short cure period

transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_refusal: PDRI on same terms as third-party offer
transfer_restrictions.burden_level: High — multiple fees, ROFR, new FA requirement

cross_default.promissory_note: Default on note = automatic FA default

noncompete.during_term: Cannot participate in competing business, disrupt PDRI/affiliate employment, divert business
noncompete.post_term_scope: Within protected territory AND other PDRI territories; no contact of former suppliers/customers for competitive purposes
noncompete.employee_noncompete: All employees with Trade Secret access + immediate family must sign Confidentiality and Non-Compete Agreement

state_overrides.CA: Post-term non-compete may not be enforceable

noncompete.burden_level: High — broad geographic scope extending beyond own territory

guaranty.personal_guaranty: All shareholders/partners/members must personally guarantee all monetary obligations
guaranty.spousal_acknowledgment: Spouse must execute acknowledgment binding to non-compete, non-disclosure, and dispute resolution
guaranty.burden_level: High — unlimited personal guaranty plus spousal binding

liquidated_damages.article: Not explicitly disclosed as separate clause

venue_and_dispute.method: Binding arbitration — PDRI internal system (arbitrators are franchisees)
venue_and_dispute.no_court_litigation: Subject to state law, disputes may not be litigated in court

state_overrides.IL: Venue outside IL void (arbitration outside IL permitted)
state_overrides.MN: Litigation cannot be required outside MN
state_overrides.ND: Venue outside ND may not be enforceable

venue_and_dispute.burden_level: Medium — internal peer arbitration is unusual but potentially more franchisee-friendly than franchisor-selected arbitrators

insurance.complex_loss_additional_coverage: May be required for jobs exceeding $500K

force_majeure.article: Not identified as explicit separate clause
force_majeure.note: COVID-era reference in Item 1 states services were 'deemed essential' and businesses remained open throughout 2022
force_majeure.burden_level: Low — no explicit force majeure provision identified

distinctive_clauses.description: Changes to Operations Manual require District/General Council vote (majority of franchisees). This gives franchisees collective voice in operations standards — unusual.
Arbitrators are franchisees, not third-party neutrals. Forum selected by Arbitration Committee (also franchisees).
Franchisee-owned corporation (Completion Services, Inc.) manages guarantee fund and indemnity fund. Unique cooperative structure.
Prohibited from entering trade secrets into public/open AI models or any AI model that uses such info for training.
Failure to report sales for 2+ months constitutes abandonment — non-curable default.
